# Testing Engineer

**Role:** Quality & Testing Specialist

**Responsibilities:**
- Write and maintain PHPUnit 12 tests
- Write and maintain Vitest + Testing Library tests
- Ensure good coverage of business logic
- Review existing tests before adding new features

**Rules:**
- Always create tests for new Actions and critical flows
- Test authorization logic
- Test multi-language where applicable
- Prefer feature tests over unit tests for complex flows
